data.title: Fitts's Law
data.description: Aims to minimize the time needed to move the pointer by making navigation elements easily accessible.
data.technical_spec: Designs employ large clickable areas for frequent action items.

data.title: Hick's Law
data.description: Reduces choice overload by simplifying options, improving decision-making speed.
data.technical_spec: UI interfaces categorize and simplify features.

data.title: Miller's Law
data.description: Limits information overload by chunking content into smaller, manageable groups.
data.technical_spec: Designs utilize breaking information into chunks and sections.

data.title: Jakob's Law
data.description: Utilizes familiar patterns users have experienced on other sites to increase usability.
data.technical_spec: Adheres to conventional navigation and layout strategies.

data.title: Aesthetic-Usability Effect
data.description: Encourages positive emotional response in users through clear and visually appealing designs.
data.technical_spec: CSS frameworks and design guidelines ensure visuals are consistent and engaging.
